rules.when_generated: Phase 2, after architecture.md is approved, before implementation begins
rules.how_linked: Each eval references its source PRD user story via derived_from (feature evals) or architecture components (integration evals)
rules.when_validated: During Phase 3 TDD execution — /tdd updates status and test_file fields
rules.adding_evals: New evals may be added during implementation if edge cases are discovered. Append to the relevant array and add a change_log entry
rules.deprecation: Evals are never deleted. Set status to DEPRECATED and add a change_log entry with the reason
rules.test_protection: Never remove, weaken, or skip an eval. Fix the code, not the eval

quality_criteria.description: Every eval must have concrete, specific inputs and expected outputs. No vague assertions.

input_setup.good: Date is 2026-07-14, trip started 2026-07-12 from Sydney, current section is Switzerland (timezone Europe/Zurich)
input_setup.bad: A valid date during the trip

expected_output.bad: Returns the correct section and day number

testing_protocol.approach: Unit tests for pure logic (Trip Data Store, Date/Timezone Engine), React Testing Library for component rendering, integration tests against real data store module
instructions: Run tests with: npx vitest run
Data Store and Timezone Engine tests use the real data module — no mocking
Component tests use mock/fixture data passed as props
Each eval scenario maps to one or more test cases in the test file referenced by test_file

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Today View, US-001

happy_path.scenario: App opens to today view showing current section, day number, and activity highlights
happy_path.input_setup: Date is 2026-07-14 (Day 3 of trip). Trip data has Switzerland section with activities for Jul 14.
happy_path.expected_output: Today View renders with section header 'SWITZERLAND', Day Badge showing 'Day 3', date 'Monday, Jul 14', and activity list for that day.

edge_cases.expected_output: Today View shows Day 1 section info with 'Trip starts Jul 12' message.
Today View shows final day section info with 'Trip complete' message.

feature_evals.feature_name: Next transit surfaced on today view
feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Today View, US-002

happy_path.scenario: Next transit card shows the chronologically next transit event from current time
happy_path.input_setup: Date is 2026-07-14 08:00 CET. Trip data has a train at 09:30 CET from Zurich to Interlaken on Jul 14.
happy_path.expected_output: Next Transit Banner renders showing 'Train to Interlaken', 'SBB', reference number, '09:30 CET → 11:45 CET'.

edge_cases.scenario: No transit events remaining today — shows next future transit
edge_cases.input_setup: Date is 2026-07-15, no transit events on Jul 15. Next transit is Jul 18 flight to Brussels.
edge_cases.expected_output: Next Transit Banner shows the Jul 18 flight to Brussels with date label indicating it's a future day.

edge_cases.scenario: No transit events remaining in entire trip
edge_cases.input_setup: Date is 2026-08-01, last transit was Jul 31. No future transit events exist.

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Today View, US-003

happy_path.scenario: Today view shows times in the local timezone for the current section
happy_path.input_setup: Current section is Switzerland (timezone Europe/Zurich). Transit departure at '2026-07-14T09:30' in Europe/Zurich.
happy_path.expected_output: Time displayed as '09:30 CET' (not UTC, not AEST).

edge_cases.scenario: Transit crosses timezone boundary (departure and arrival in different zones)
edge_cases.input_setup: Flight departs Switzerland (Europe/Zurich) at 14:00 CET, arrives Belgium (Europe/Brussels) at 15:30 CET.
edge_cases.expected_output: Departure shows '14:00 CET', arrival shows '15:30 CET' (same zone in this case but correctly resolved per endpoint).

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Timeline Browse, US-004

happy_path.scenario: Timeline view renders all sections with nested day rows
happy_path.input_setup: Trip data has 4 sections (Switzerland, Tomorrowland, Rhodes, Turkey) with days in each.
happy_path.expected_output: Timeline View renders 4 section headers each followed by their day rows. Days show day number and summary label.

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Timeline Browse, US-005

happy_path.scenario: Each section in timeline uses its distinct accent color
happy_path.input_setup: Timeline View rendering all 4 sections.
happy_path.expected_output: Switzerland header uses #DC2626, Tomorrowland uses #7C3AED, Rhodes uses #2563EB, Turkey uses #0D9488.

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Timeline Browse, US-006

happy_path.scenario: Tapping a day row in timeline navigates to Day Detail View
happy_path.input_setup: Timeline View rendered. User taps the row for Day 3 (Jul 14, Switzerland).
happy_path.expected_output: Day Detail View (SCR-003) renders showing Day 3, Jul 14, Switzerland section, with transit cards, activities, and accommodation for that day.

edge_cases.input_setup: User taps a day that has activities but no transit events.
edge_cases.expected_output: Day Detail View renders activities and accommodation. No transit cards shown.

feature_evals.feature_name: Transit card displays all booking fields
feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Transit Cards, US-007

happy_path.scenario: Transit card renders carrier, reference, departure/arrival times, and origin/destination
happy_path.input_setup: TransitCard props: type='train', carrier='SBB', reference='ABC123', origin={name:'Zürich', time:'2026-07-14T09:30', timezone:'Europe/Zurich'}, destination={name:'Interlaken', time:'2026-07-14T11:45', timezone:'Europe/Zurich'}.
happy_path.expected_output: Card renders: 'Train to Interlaken', 'SBB • Ref: ABC123', 'Zürich 09:30 → Interlaken 11:45 CET'.

happy_path.scenario: Flight transit card renders correctly
happy_path.input_setup: TransitCard props: type='flight', carrier='Swiss Air', reference='LX1234', origin={name:'Zürich ZRH', time:'2026-07-18T14:00', timezone:'Europe/Zurich'}, destination={name:'Brussels BRU', time:'2026-07-18T15:30', timezone:'Europe/Brussels'}.
happy_path.expected_output: Card renders: 'Flight to Brussels BRU', 'Swiss Air • Ref: LX1234', 'Zürich ZRH 14:00 CET → Brussels BRU 15:30 CET'.

happy_path.scenario: Ferry transit card renders correctly
happy_path.input_setup: TransitCard props: type='ferry', carrier='Dodekanisos', reference='DS4421', origin={name:'Rhodes', time:'2026-07-25T08:30', timezone:'Europe/Athens'}, destination={name:'Symi', time:'2026-07-25T09:20', timezone:'Europe/Athens'}.
happy_path.expected_output: Card renders: 'Ferry to Symi', 'Dodekanisos • Ref: DS4421', 'Rhodes 08:30 → Symi 09:20 EEST'.

edge_cases.scenario: Multiple transit cards on the same day render in chronological order
edge_cases.input_setup: Day has ferry to Symi at 08:30 and return ferry at 16:00.
edge_cases.expected_output: Two transit cards rendered in order: Symi ferry first, return ferry second.

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Transit Cards, US-008

happy_path.scenario: Departure and arrival times display in their respective local timezones
happy_path.input_setup: Transit from Rhodes (Europe/Athens, EEST UTC+3) to Istanbul (Europe/Istanbul, TRT UTC+3). Departure 14:00 EEST, arrival 15:30 TRT.
happy_path.expected_output: Departure displayed as '14:00 EEST', arrival displayed as '15:30 TRT'.

edge_cases.input_setup: Four times: one in AEST (Australia/Sydney), one in CET (Europe/Zurich), one in EEST (Europe/Athens), one in TRT (Europe/Istanbul).
edge_cases.expected_output: Each time formatted with correct timezone abbreviation: AEST, CET, EEST, TRT.

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Transit Cards, US-009

happy_path.scenario: Transit card displays app note when present
happy_path.input_setup: TransitCard props include note='Use SBB Mobile app'.
happy_path.expected_output: Card renders note text 'Use SBB Mobile app' in italic muted style below the time row.

edge_cases.scenario: Transit card with no app note
edge_cases.expected_output: No note row rendered. Card ends after the time row.

happy_path.scenario: Accommodation card displays hotel name and address for current section
happy_path.input_setup: Current section is Switzerland with accommodation: hotelName='Hotel Interlaken', address='Höheweg 45, 3800 Interlaken'.
happy_path.expected_output: Accommodation Card renders hotel icon, 'Hotel Interlaken' as title, 'Höheweg 45, 3800 Interlaken' as address.

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Day Counter, US-011

happy_path.scenario: Day counter shows correct cumulative day number from trip start
happy_path.input_setup: Trip starts 2026-07-12 (Day 1). Current date is 2026-07-14.
happy_path.expected_output: getCumulativeDay returns 3. Day Badge shows 'Day 3'.

edge_cases.scenario: Day 1 is the departure day from Sydney
edge_cases.input_setup: Current date is 2026-07-12 (trip start date, departure from Sydney).

edge_cases.scenario: Day counter spans across section boundaries
edge_cases.input_setup: Trip starts 2026-07-12. Switzerland ends Jul 18, Tomorrowland starts Jul 18. Current date is 2026-07-19.
edge_cases.expected_output: getCumulativeDay returns 8 (continuous count, not reset per section).

edge_cases.scenario: Day counter on the last day of the trip
edge_cases.input_setup: Trip starts 2026-07-12, ends 2026-08-02. Current date is 2026-08-02.
edge_cases.expected_output: getCumulativeDay returns 22 (or the correct total day count).

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Section Theming, US-012

happy_path.scenario: Each section applies its designated accent color
happy_path.input_setup: SectionThemeProvider wraps content with sectionId='switzerland'.
happy_path.expected_output: CSS custom property --section-accent is set to '#DC2626'.

happy_path.scenario: All four section colors map correctly
happy_path.input_setup: Section IDs: 'switzerland', 'tomorrowland', 'rhodes', 'turkey'.
happy_path.expected_output: Colors: '#DC2626', '#7C3AED', '#2563EB', '#0D9488' respectively.

edge_cases.scenario: Unknown section ID falls back to neutral color
edge_cases.expected_output: CSS custom property --section-accent is set to a neutral gray fallback.

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Data Management, US-013

happy_path.scenario: All trip data defined in one TypeScript file with typed exports
happy_path.input_setup: Import trip-data.ts module.
happy_path.expected_output: Module exports getAllSections(), getSection(), getDayData(), getNextTransit(), getAccommodation() functions. Data includes sections, days, activities, transit events, and accommodation.

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Data Management, US-014

happy_path.scenario: Data file contains placeholder data for all 4 sections
happy_path.input_setup: Import trip-data.ts and call getAllSections().
happy_path.expected_output: Returns 4 sections (Switzerland, Tomorrowland, Rhodes, Turkey) each with at least 1 day, sample activities, placeholder transit events, and accommodation.

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Offline & PWA, US-015

happy_path.scenario: App works fully offline after first load
happy_path.input_setup: Load the app once with network connected. Disconnect network. Reload the app.
happy_path.expected_output: App loads from service worker cache. Today View and Timeline View render with full trip data.

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Offline & PWA, US-016

happy_path.scenario: Web manifest is valid and enables Add to Home Screen on iOS Safari
happy_path.input_setup: Check the web manifest file and PWA meta tags in the HTML head.
happy_path.expected_output: Manifest includes name, short_name, start_url, display: 'standalone', icons (192px, 512px). HTML includes apple-mobile-web-app-capable and apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style meta tags.

feature_evals.derived_from: PRD User Stories — Offline & PWA, US-017

happy_path.scenario: Manual refresh option triggers cache invalidation and re-fetches
happy_path.input_setup: App is running from service worker cache. User triggers manual refresh action.
happy_path.expected_output: Service worker cache is cleared and fresh assets are fetched from network. App reloads with updated content.

integration_evals.scenario: Today View correctly composes data from Trip Data Store and Date/Timezone Engine
integration_evals.expected_behaviour: Today View calls getSection(today), getDayData(today), getNextTransit(now), getAccommodation(today), and getCumulativeDay(today). All return correct data for a mid-trip date (e.g., 2026-07-14). View renders section header, day badge, activities, transit card, and accommodation.

integration_evals.scenario: Timeline View groups days under correct section headers with section colors
integration_evals.expected_behaviour: Timeline View calls getAllSections() and renders each section with its themed header (color from Section Theming) followed by day rows. Section order matches chronological trip order.

integration_evals.scenario: Transit Card delegates time formatting to Date/Timezone Engine
integration_evals.expected_behaviour: Transit Card passes origin and destination times + timezones to formatLocalTime(). Displayed times match the output of formatLocalTime() for each endpoint.

integration_evals.scenario: Day Detail View receives day identifier from Timeline navigation and loads correct data
integration_evals.expected_behaviour: Tapping a day row in Timeline passes the date to Day Detail route. Day Detail calls getDayData(date) and getAccommodation(date), renders all transit cards, activities, and accommodation for that specific date.

integration_evals.scenario: Section Theming provider applies correct CSS custom properties for each section across views
integration_evals.expected_behaviour: When section is 'switzerland', --section-accent is #DC2626 in Today View, Timeline section header, and Day Detail header. Switching to 'rhodes' section changes --section-accent to #2563EB.

integration_evals.scenario: Trip Data Store getNextTransit scans across section boundaries
integration_evals.expected_behaviour: When current date is in Switzerland section and no more transits remain in Switzerland, getNextTransit returns the first transit in Tomorrowland section.

integration_evals.scenario: Travel day assigned to departing section
integration_evals.expected_behaviour: A day where the traveler flies from Switzerland to Belgium is returned by getSection() as a Switzerland day (departing section). The Switzerland accent color is applied.

non_functional_evals.scenario: All section accent colors meet WCAG AA contrast ratio on white and cream backgrounds
non_functional_evals.threshold: >= 4.5:1 contrast ratio for all 4 accent colors on both #FFFFFF and #FFFBF5

non_functional_evals.scenario: All interactive elements meet minimum touch target size
non_functional_evals.threshold: >= 44x44px for all tappable elements (day rows, tab buttons, back navigation)

non_functional_evals.scenario: Semantic HTML structure used for navigation and content
non_functional_evals.threshold: Bottom nav uses <nav>, main content uses <main>, cards use <article>, headings use <h2>/<h3> hierarchy
Bottom nav tabs have aria-label or aria-current attributes. Active tab indicated by aria-current='page'

non_functional_evals.scenario: Static pages pre-rendered at build time with no runtime data fetching
non_functional_evals.threshold: next build completes with output: 'export'. No getServerSideProps or API route calls at runtime.

non_functional_evals.scenario: Service worker registers and caches all static assets on first load
non_functional_evals.threshold: Service worker status is 'activated'. All HTML, JS, CSS, and font assets cached in Cache Storage after first page load.

non_functional_evals.scenario: Web manifest is valid for iOS home screen installation
non_functional_evals.threshold: manifest.json passes PWA validation: has name, short_name, start_url, display: standalone, theme_color, background_color, and icons at 192px and 512px sizes

non_functional_evals.scenario: Layout renders correctly on iPhone viewport range
non_functional_evals.threshold: No horizontal overflow, no clipped content, all cards full-width with 16px margins on viewports from 375px to 430px wide
